name: Waning Redshift
passive_desc: Increases Resonance Skill DMG by 24%. After Resonance Skill hits a target, creates a gravity field that pulls enemies and deals 80% ATK as DMG. CD 12s.
description: Pistols that manipulate gravitational forces through advanced Resonance technology. Their shots bend spacetime itself, dragging enemies toward the point of impact like matter spiraling into a black hole.
